description: Implement skeleton-config bootstrap per DEC-0001 / FGAP-001. In packages/pi-context/src/context.ts add writeSkeletonConfig (never-clobber, mints substrate_id, writes via writeConfigForDir) + isSkeletonConfig predicate, and change adoptConception's guard to if(existing && !isSkeletonConfig(existing)). In src/index.ts have initProject (248-298) and switchAndCreate (548-575) call writeSkeletonConfig after the dir-scaffold loop and update their completion/notify messages. In src/context-sdk.ts add the 'skeleton' state to the BootstrapStatus union and to deriveBootstrapState's ordered checks. In src/ops-registry.ts update the context-bootstrap-state (and context-init / context-accept-all as needed) description strings. Rework accept-all.test.ts idempotent + 'no defaults' tests, keep the no-config test in context-sdk.test.ts and add a skeleton-state test, add unit tests for isSkeletonConfig + init/switch-c skeleton writes + first amend-config add on a skeleton. Full completion sequence: build, check, test, runtime demo against a throwaway substrate, adversarial probe, regen skills. Implemented by a foreground coding subagent from the approved plan; orchestrator runs all npm and is sole git writer; per-step commit.
